samples.gvd:
module pulse_detect #(
    parameter s0 = 2'b00,
    parameter s1 = 2'b01,
    parameter s2 = 2'b10,
    parameter s3 = 2'b11
) (
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    input data_in,
    output reg data_out
);


reg [1:0] state;

always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
    if (~rst_n) begin
        state <= s0;
        data_out <= 1'b0;
    end else begin
        case(state)
            s0: begin
                if(data_in == 1'b0) begin
                    state <= s1;
                end else begin
                    state <= s0;
                end
            end
            s1: begin
                if(data_in == 1'b1) begin
                    state <= s2;
                end else begin
                    state <= s1;
                end
            end
            s2: begin
                if(data_in == 1'b0) begin
                    state <= s3;
                end else begin
                    state <= s0;
                end
            end
            s3: begin
                if(data_in == 1'b1) begin
                    state <= s2;
                end else begin
                    state <= s1;
                end
            end
        endcase
    end
end

always @(*) begin
    if((state == s2) && (data_in == 1'b0)) begin
        data_out = 1'b1;
    end else begin
        data_out = 1'b0;
    end
end
endmodule
